work_unit: H-003 tunnel_client relay token log redaction
situation: audit-2026-07-06-021 finding H-003 (high): scripts/ecs_relay/tunnel_client.py:51 prints full wss://ECS:443/ws/tunnel?token=<secret> URL to stdout. Anyone tailing logs (systemd journal, container log aggregator, debug session) sees the bearer token in plaintext → credential leak → unauthorized ECS relay access.
action: 派生 route-fix：引入 ecs_log_url 变量，把 query string 替换为 ?token=<redacted>；保留原 ecs_url 用于 websockets.connect（连接本身仍需真 token）。仅改一个文件，非公共接口，复用同 area worktree。
outcome_evidence: git push origin auto/opt-scripts-1783339532 成功（new branch）；worktree HEAD commit msg='fix(tunnel_client): mask relay token in stdout log to prevent credential leak (H-003 from audit-2026-07-06-021)'；Code Review URL https://code.alibaba-inc.com/qunbu/personal-assistant/codereview/new?from=main&to=auto/opt-scripts-1783339532
next_suggestion: 继续派生 H-004 (audio_relay.py:222 binds 0.0.0.0 no auth)
再下一轮 M-001 (auth.py:49 /ws/ prefix exempted but ws_xiaozhi has no self-auth)

audit_findings.finding: RELAY_TOKEN leaked in plaintext via print(f'...{ecs_url}') — ecs_url includes ?token= query string
audit_findings.remediation: Introduce ecs_log_url with token replaced by <redacted>; use original ecs_url only for websockets.connect
